name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts biweekly tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts biweekly, missed contract renewals cause service disruptions. We provide timely reminders instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts biweekly
problem_solved: Missed contract renewals leading to service disruptions

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts biweekly
locked_fields.primary_problem: Missed contract renewals leading to service disruptions
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts biweekly, missed contract renewals cause service disruptions. We provide timely reminders instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of contract dates using spreadsheets

one_liner: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts biweekly, missed contract renewals cause service disruptions. We provide timely reminders instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
